title: Ralph Loop Input
description: Validated inputs for ralph-loop skill execution

action.description: The ralph-loop operation to perform (status: check loop state, reset: clear state, config: show/set config)

maxIterations.description: Maximum number of loop iterations before forced stop

completionSignal.description: String that must appear in transcript to signal genuine completion

promptPath.description: Path to the PROMPT.md file to re-inject each iteration

circuitBreakerThreshold.description: Number of identical consecutive states before circuit breaker triggers
